gold: Sí. ¿Me podrías repetir? Porque se cortó un poco.

sigWerErrors.reason: 'si' (if) and 'te' (you) are different pronouns and change the subject and meaning of the request, which can confuse the intent of the sentence.
Omitting 'me' (to me) changes the recipient of the action, altering the meaning of the request.
